mode: external static read-only dashboard artifact only
title: POWER_LOTTO Forward-row Progress Dashboard

milestones.title: Scorer computability audit
milestones.summary: Prize-aware scoring requirements were reconciled; POWER_LOTTO completeness remained blocked by missing second-zone values in historical rows. Technical audit only.

milestones.title: Second-zone gap root cause
milestones.summary: The POWER_LOTTO gap was traced to generation and persistence omissions. The boundary stayed forward-only with no historical backfill.

milestones.title: Second-zone helper and guard
milestones.summary: A forward helper and fail-fast guard were prepared in an external worktree for review; no canonical data was changed.

milestones.title: Forward row builder
milestones.summary: A guarded forward-row builder path was prepared for a single POWER_LOTTO row with non-NULL second-zone output when history is sufficient.

milestones.title: Temp DB rehearsal
milestones.summary: Generate, guard, and persist were demonstrated only in an isolated rehearsal database.

milestones.title: Canonical-copy dry run
milestones.summary: Parent and child insert behavior was demonstrated on a byte-copied canonical database, not on the canonical database itself.

milestones.title: Real DB rollback dry run
milestones.summary: The real canonical database was opened inside a guarded transaction, validated in transaction, then rolled back. No durable row remained.

milestones.title: Durable canonical write gate
milestones.summary: No separate P340A evidence root was found. Durable canonical write, backup, insert, COMMIT, and backfill remain not authorized.

validation.note: All seven listed roots are accessible as directories.
Repeated shallow discovery found no standalone p340a evidence root; the only p340a match was inside the P341A viewer filename.

validation.check: DB write / backup / insert / COMMIT / backfill
validation.note: No DB connection or mutation was needed for this static artifact.
No planned or performed repo write; output root is external to the repo.
Dashboard contains technical evidence only and no recommended-number, betting, or prediction claim.

next_step_options: Owner GO durable-write path, separately authorized
remaining_blocker: Durable canonical DB write remains gated because no separate P340A owner GO evidence root was found and no durable-write authorization is present.
